Request PROC.2026.00000175 was registered by Bruno Costa for project Student Portal, with an estimated amount of 6.784,75€. The case was opened with the available administrative information, assigned to the competent service, and prepared for subsequent validation of documents, budget information, and process eligibility.

The order document reflects the validated request, the authorized expenditure, and the recorded financial commitment, and it is now available to support communication with the requester and the completion of the procurement procedure.

Requester Bruno Costa was notified about the outcome of process PROC.2026.00000175. The communication includes the relevant administrative information and confirms that the preceding validation, authorization, commitment, and order activities have been completed, allowing the process to move toward closure.

Administrative closure was recorded for process PROC.2026.00000175. The case has completed the prescribed sequence of validation, budget verification, authorization, commitment, order issuing, and notification, and it is now considered finalized for operational and reporting purposes.
